/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compare_d_runaway_alert.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/compare_d_runaway_alert.dir/compare/compare_d_runaway_alert.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_d_runaway_alert.dir/src/ecm.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_d_runaway_alert.dir/src/ekf.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_d_runaway_alert.dir/src/arrhenius.c.o -o compare_d_runaway_alert  -lm
